channel.title: Command-Line on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Command-Line on Arrans github.io

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: ogham/exa
item.description: A modern replacement for ‘ls’.

item.title: 89luca89/distrobox
item.description: Use any linux distribution inside your terminal. Enable both backward and forward compatibility with software and freedom to use whatever distribution you’re more comfortable with. Mirror available at: https://gitlab.com/89luca89/distrobox

item.title: wavetermdev/waveterm
item.description: An open-source, AI-integrated, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: 💾 The shell-like, command line terminal file manager

item.title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
item.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

item.title: Aider-AI/aider
item.description: aider is AI pair programming in your terminal

item.title: microsoft/winget-cli
item.description: WinGet is the Windows Package Manager. This project includes a CLI (Command Line Interface), PowerShell modules, and a COM (Component Object Model) API (Application Programming Interface).

item.title: PowerShell/PowerShell
item.description: PowerShell for every system!

item.title: spf13/cobra
item.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

item.title: johnkerl/miller
item.description: Miller is like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON

item.title: dylanaraps/neofetch
item.description: 🖼️ A command-line system information tool written in bash 3.2+

item.title: go-shiori/shiori
item.description: Simple bookmark manager built with Go

item.title: nao1215/sqly
item.description: executes SQL against CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Microsoft Excel™ , ACH, and Fedwire files with shell.

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive (https://codeberg.org/mrus/neonmodem)

item.title: lasantosr/intelli-shell
item.description: Like IntelliSense, but for shells

item.title: curl/wcurl
item.description: a simple wrapper around curl to easily download files

item.title: arran4/strings2
item.description: Some golang string helper functions focused around case transformation but other things in the future.
